messages.text: Hi Rob. I am here with you. What would you like to talk through today?

Hello Rob, it’s great to see you again. I heard you’ve been busy with your impressionist painting and reading lately — which sounds like a wonderful way to spend your time.  

Are you feeling inspired to pick up the brush today, or is this more of a cozy reading afternoon?
Cozier one. Just read about the grapes of wrath

That sounds like a perfect kind of book for a quiet afternoon. *The Grapes of Wrath* is such a powerful novel—so vivid and full of feeling.

Does it remind you of any particular time in your own life? Or maybe bring back some memories or stories?
